title: A train moves east at 20 m/s relative to the ground. A passe
stem: A train moves east at 20 m/s relative to the ground. A passenger on the train throws a ball forward (east) at 5 m/s relative to themselves.

parts.label: a
parts.prompt: What is the velocity of the ball as measured by an observer standing on the ground?

parts.label: b
parts.prompt: If a second observer is moving west at 10 m/s relative to the ground, what velocity do they measure for the ball?

title: Two events occur in spacetime. Event A is at position x = 0
stem: Two events occur in spacetime. Event A is at position x = 0 light-seconds at time t = 0 seconds. Event B is at position x = 5 light-seconds at time t = 3 seconds.

parts.label: a
parts.prompt: Calculate the spacetime interval Δs² between Event A and Event B using the formula Δs² = −Δt² + Δx².

parts.label: b
parts.prompt: Is the separation between these two events space-like, time-like, or light-like? Justify your answer using the value of Δs² you found in part (a).

title: Space Cows -- mooo!
stem: Bessie and Charli are two space cows traveling to the right through deep space. Farmer Frank, at rest on his space station, observes Bessie traveling to the right at 0.90c and Charli traveling to the right at 0.70c.

parts.label: a
parts.prompt: Using the relativistic velocity addition formula, calculate the velocity of Bessie as observed by Charli in Charli's own rest frame. Express your answer in terms of c.

title: An astronaut travels from Earth to Alpha Centauri (4.37 ligh
stem: An astronaut travels from Earth to Alpha Centauri (4.37 light-years away) in a spaceship moving at β = 4/5 (i.e., v = 0.8c).

parts.label: a
parts.prompt: How long does the trip take according to an observer on Earth?

parts.label: b
parts.prompt: How long does the trip take according to the astronaut on the spaceship?

title: Thre relativity of nile boats.
stem: A boat travels down the Nile River. The river current flows at v = 3 m/s north relative to the ground (frame S). The boat moves at u = 7 m/s north relative to the ground (frame S).

parts.label: a
parts.prompt: What is the boat's velocity u′ as measured in the reference frame S′ of the river current?
